title: AIIMS Delhi – Technician, Research Associate and More – 4 Posts
shortInfo: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Recruitment 2026 for 4 posts of Project Scientist –III. Candidates with M.E/M.Tech, PhD Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 31-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through AIIMS Delhi official website aiims.edu.

basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Technician, Research Associate and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Recruitment 2026 for 4 posts of Project Scientist –III. Candidates with M.E/M.Tech, PhD Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 31-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through AIIMS Delhi official website aiims.edu.

qualification.education_qualification: Doctoral Degree in Science or Master's in Engineering/Technology with 6 years research experience, PhD in life sciences, BSc or 3 years Diploma in Engineering & Technology

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
